name: Backup workflows to GitHub (adapted: flow list summary to Slack)
description: Fetches the current One CLI flow list, uses Claude AI to analyze and summarize the flow inventory, and posts a structured backup report to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Back up your n8n workflows to Github

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the backup summary

flowDirectory.description: Path to the One CLI flows directory

steps.name: Run Claude AI analysis on flow inventory
Build Slack Block Kit backup report
